# pi-pompom

> A 3D raymarched virtual pet companion for Pi CLI terminals.

## What It Does

Pompom is a terminal widget that renders an animated 3D creature above the Pi editor using Unicode quadrant and half-block characters. It has physics, weather, accessories, a mini-game, voice sync, and responds to keyboard shortcuts and slash commands.

## Key Capabilities

- Real-time raymarched 3D rendering with hybrid quadrant/half-block rendering
- 13 interactive states including a star-catching mini-game
- Weather system: clear, cloudy, rain, storm, snow with smooth transitions
- Weather accessories: umbrella, scarf, sunglasses, hat (persistent across sessions)
- Voice integration: mouth syncs to audio when recording with pi-listen
- Cross-platform keyboard shortcuts (macOS Option, Windows/Linux Alt, Kitty protocol)
- Natural scene: sun, moon, stars, clouds, hills, grass, flowers

## Usage

```bash
pi install @codexstar/pi-pompom
```

Then in Pi: `/pompom on`, `/pompom help` for commands, `/pompom game` to play.

## File Index

- [README.md](README.md): Full documentation with commands, shortcuts, and features
- [extensions/pompom.ts](extensions/pompom.ts): Core renderer, physics, shading, weather, game, and public API
- [extensions/pompom-extension.ts](extensions/pompom-extension.ts): Pi extension lifecycle, commands, keyboard input, persistence
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Development setup
- [CHANGELOG.md](CHANGELOG.md): Version history
